task.json description line 7 and export_result.sh line 66 (search query 'ilike Return Travel')

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating two buffer events around a pre-existing anchor event named 'Client Onboarding - Isabel Santos' scheduled for Wednesday of the week following the upcoming Monday at 14:00-15:30. The pre-travel event 'Travel to Client' must be 1 hour (60 minutes) long with location 'In Transit' and end exactly when the anchor event starts. The post-travel event 'Return Travel' must also be 1 hour (60 minutes) long with location 'In Transit' and start exactly when the anchor event ends. The anchor event is synthetic data created by setup_data.py as part of the Odoo 17 scheduling environment.
